# @json-express/transport-fastify — AI Context

High-throughput HTTP transport on Fastify 5. Drop-in replacement for transport-express — same routes, same JSON error contract.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/transport-fastify
```
Discovery is automatic; with transport-express also installed choose `jex.transport=@json-express/transport-fastify`. **Never import fastify or register fastify plugins — per-request logic belongs in `middleware-*` packages.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.port` | `3000` | Listen port (global key, read by the runner) |
| `jex.transport.fastify.logger` | `false` | Enable Fastify's internal logger |
| `jex.transport.fastify.ssl.key` / `.cert` | (none) | TLS in PEM strings |

## Behavior contract
- Consistent JSON errors (404/500 shape identical to transport-express); fails loudly on EADDRINUSE.
- Binds 0.0.0.0 (container-friendly); per-request `traceId` correlation.
